oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.2.1) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Sidebar auto-unfold + session-nav shortcut rebind (PR #60, via /orchestrate). The sidebar now auto-expands the workspace containing the focused session on any focus change (cross-workspace ⌘⇧↑/↓, ⌘1–9, click) via two .onChange observers feeding a small expand-only discloseActiveWorkspace() helper. Global Previous/Next Session rebound from ⌘⇧←/→ to ⌘⇧↑/↓ across both definition sites that must stay in sync — the SwiftUI menu accelerator (WorkspaceCommands) and the NSEvent keyCode monitor (KeyBindingRegistry, 125 Down / 126 Up); tests updated. Verified: BUILD SUCCEEDED + 927 tianTests green; /code-review medium applied (deduped .onAppear to the shared helper).

Released v1.2.1 (patch) — fixes the Session Overview (⌘⇧O) multi-workspace ↑/↓ nav limitation known in v1.2.0: Up/Down now step across workspace-section boundaries via a pure, tested OverviewGridNavigation helper that models the actual stacked-per-workspace visual layout instead of a flat global-columnCount grid (PR #59, 11 new tests). Built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast (build 395) live. publish.sh ran clean end-to-end this time — sign_update succeeded (EdDSA key present in the login keychain), no manual appcast recovery needed.

Released v1.2.0 — Session Overview (⌘⇧O) UX overhaul (PR #58): full 2D keyboard nav (arrows select, Enter opens, Escape dismisses; selection defaults to the active session + self-heals); status shown as a card border via a shared ClaudeSessionState.solidStatusColor palette (also feeds the sidebar dot) replacing the status dot; full-bleed .ultraThinMaterial frosted overlay replacing Liquid Glass (which sheened diagonally at that size — HIG: glass is for chrome, not large content). Delivered via /orchestrate + a fresh /code-review medium. Built, notarized, stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.

Show the latest submitted prompt on each Session Overview card (⌘⇧O), on a line above the branch/diff footer. Capture rides the existing claude-settings hook pipeline: a new UserPromptSubmit hook (tian-hook-prompt.sh) forwards `.prompt` via a new `tian prompt set --text` CLI / `prompt.set` IPC into a per-pane PaneStatusManager store (PVM-mirrored so SwiftUI re-renders, ephemeral, cleared with the status label), surfaced as Session.latestPrompt in SessionOverviewCardView. Delivered via /orchestrate (5 agents, 2 file-disjoint waves) + /code-review (4 findings applied, 1 refuted by design). Verified: 916 tianTests green; hook bundled + wired into UserPromptSubmit in the built app.
